falsifier: Signed receipt tamper is accepted, checkpoint verification fails silently, quarantine no longer isolates non-canonical branches, or exported local proofs stop verifying.
threat_model_scope: Local workspace trust only; excludes global transparency logs, semantic truth, and hidden provider identity.
public_note: Representative public manifest for the local core-trust lane: signed receipts, local signed head checkpoints, canonical head selection, and quarantine.
claim_boundary: Local core trust proves local provenance and local canonical-head selection. It does not prove semantic truth or global non-equivocation.
